_why: Golden tap-to-answer chips per interview topic, asserted from BOTH the Python bank (apps/ai-service, tests/test_answer_chips.py) and the TypeScript mock (apps/api/src/ai/mock-interview.test.ts). Two independent copies exist because TD81 means staging runs the MOCK path, so the mock's strings are what a real staging worker taps. Only the Python side can execute a chip against signals.detect_answered_topics; without this file the mock could drift to a string that fabricates and both suites would stay green.
_rule: Every string here is an ANSWER to its topic's question, never a question. The Python suite runs each one through the detector and requires it to resolve its own topic. Topics absent from this map (current_location, preferred_locations) are free-text ONLY: the city space is open, and any list we offered would be cities we put in the worker's mouth.
